title: tanacetum depauperatum
intro: Tanacetum depauperatum, also known as Tanacetum micropoides or a variant of the pyrethrum daisy, is a plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and pyrethrins. The health benefits of Tanacetum depauperatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Tanacetum depauperatum can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or topical application, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
